faqs.answer:
Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
MCA Candidate must have passed Mathematics at 10+2 level or Graduation level. Candidates with grace marks are not allowed for admission. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

placements.overview:
Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) is a private institute, established in 2003 in Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh. Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 2 courses at PG levels. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM and MCA in Full Time mode. Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,22,400 to 1,33,000. Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) has an annual seat intake of 180 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the PG level. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MCA. Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Ewing Christian Institute of Management and Technology (ECIMT) courses stands around INR 1,22,400 to 1,33,000.

college_info.college_name: BIS Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for BIS Group of Institutions admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BIS Group of Institutions offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Whereas, at PG level, BIS Group of Institutions offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. BIS Group of Institutions fee structure for all the courses is around INR 46,000 to 2,40,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied by the promise of placements.

review_content.Placements: The placements were there till 2014 batch, after that, there was nothing. Just the students took admission and passed their courses with 0% placement. There was a job fest for the 2012 batch, but the salary package was very low, it was unexpected, so I am dissatisfied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a Wi-Fi enabled campus, classrooms, well-maintained hi-tech library and good medical services were available. In the name of sports, there is an annual sports competition in a year, it was awesome. The food in the hostel was average. The canteen was in medium condition, so it was average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2024 and very good teachers.

review_content.Placements: 98% of students got placed successfully in college. The highest package was 12 LPA. The lowest package was 2.5 LPA. The average package was 5 LPA to 7 LPA. Recruiting companies were Paytm, Google, Microsoft, and Meta. 80% of students got internships at Paytm, Mobikwik, and BharatPe. Top role offered was data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities provided by college were best. Infrastructure for course was very well. Hostel rooms were clean and well-furnished. Quality of food in mess was very good in canteen. Food quality was maintained. Medical and sports facilities given by college were the best.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

review_summary.college_name: Institute of Technology and Management, Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Institute of Technology and Management, Lucknow is the best college.

content.Placements: Around 1% of the students got placed in B.Tech courses. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the highest salary package offered was 7 LPA in the B.Tech course. The average salary package offered in the B.Tech course is 3.5 LPA. The top role offered in the course was an electronics engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for the course are very good like we have well-established labs. Classrooms are well designed and produce a positive environment. The quality of the hostel is very good. The mess of the hostel is very well and the timings are fixed for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to get the best knowledge from the best teachers.

content.Placements: Placements facilities provided by the college are good. About 40% of the students get placed. The best companies take interest in our college placements. Other small companies also visit our college for campus placements. So, we are all happy with the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are many rooms suitable for many purposes. There are labs for chemistry, physics, mechanical, electrical, electronics, and computer, and there is also a large biology lab. The classrooms are well-maintained with proper facilities. Good and healthy food is available in our college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty members and placements. Infrastructure is normal.

content.Placements: The placements here are very poor. In my batch the placements are the worst. Even the same for our seniors. The highest package is 2.2 LPA and the lowest is 1.5. the average package is 1.8lpa. Companies visit here and do the selection as well but never offer the call letters.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very normal. No Wi-Fi facilities in college for students. Classrooms are not good. Library have books but they are very old edition. No updation taken for books. Sports is valued here. Have a good ground for practice. Canteen is good as well as hostel facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: My college is best for reading for other activities inlucknow.

content.Placements: My batch's placement happened in my school programme through a civil construction company of Noida. Company name is ahluwalia construction company and salary package is decided 3 to 4 lac yearly so if you're good student and very talented you can do best in your life.
content.Infrastructure: There are a Wi-Fi network in my college itm Lucknow. And 50+ above classrooms in my college. One music room. One games room. One canteen and there are 4 labs in my college and a hostel in my college which have 60 rooms and a girl hostel which have 20 rooms. And a big playground in my college also. A big library is also there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The placements, infrastructure and the faculty of the college are good.

content.Placements: You can get a decent placement in telemarketing sectors in the college if you do BE in computer science or electronic engineering. You have more likely to be selected for placement. The core sector like mechanical engineering and civil engineering have low placements record in the college. In my batch at most 75 percent, students were only placed for 2-4 LPA package.
content.Infrastructure: The college got a decent infrastructure with all the amenities and facilities. The classrooms are of decent size with Wi-Fi, and you can get 1-2 auditoriums. The medical facilities are also provided inside the campus, and I was a day scholar, so I can't tell you more about the hostel and its food quality. I can at least tell you the hostel rooms they are good enough for you and about food it's like all the rest of hostels in India. The food will be good for only a few days then it will be like all the others.

reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for the course are very good like we have well-established labs. Classrooms are well designed and produce a positive environment. The quality of the hostel is very good. The mess of the hostel is very well and the timings are fixed for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to get the best knowledge from the best teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are many rooms suitable for many purposes. There are labs for chemistry, physics, mechanical, electrical, electronics, and computer, and there is also a large biology lab. The classrooms are well-maintained with proper facilities. Good and healthy food is available in our college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty members and placements. Infrastructure is normal.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% to 40% of students get placed in our college. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, the highest salary package is 2.6 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 1.3 LPA. Cipla and SunPharma are the top recruiting companies in our college. Around 52% of students got internships in our course. The roles offered are employees and assistant managers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college are a library, projector rooms, labs, etc. Hostel is not available. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Sports are very good. It has a cricket ground, basketball ground, badminton court, and tennis court.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college because of the behaviour of staff members and other things.

review_content.Placements: From finance specialisation, banks hire us directly after a successful interview. Companies visit our college for campus placements. Our faculty members trained us for the interview and shortlisted us because the aim of every student in our college is to get placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good housing facilities, and they secure things. Mathuradevi Group of Institutes is a big group which includes its small institutions such as MDIM, MDITM and MDIP. Some of the teachers here are good because they behave well with every student.

overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing Execut

overview_faqs.question: Is Mathuradevi Group of Institutes a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Mathuradevi Group of Institutes is a well-known institution for MCA, B.Pharma, D.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Mathuradevi Group of Institutes has a rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 2 on faculty and 3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Mathuradevi Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: No one should take admission to this college otherwise your life will be ruined.

content.Placements: This college was very bad in terms of placements. They did not get any placements done from my batch. When asked they said that covid was going on so from where should they bring a company. Earlier I had made many big promises but later I did not give any placements.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in this college. There were many courses but it was a bad college just in name This college was running just for the name sake. Even faculty members were upset, they did not get salary, and what else should I say, no matter how bad you say it was less.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Definitely, everything is good here.

content.Placements: Our college places students by providing them with campus internships. The placement hiring is direct and we have a placement committee that sends students for internships. About 60% of students get placed through our college. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Top companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc., visit the college for placements. We can expect more high salary packages outside, and it depends on skill in the pharma field. If we have experience of 2-3 years or get internships, then we can expect a salary package that ranges from 10-13 LPA. Top roles in our course we can open our own factor, quality assurance, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 20% to 40% of students get placed in our college. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, the highest salary package is 2.6 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 1.3 LPA. Cipla and SunPharma are the top recruiting companies in our college. Around 52% of students got internships in our course. The roles offered are employees and assistant managers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college are a library, projector rooms, labs, etc. Hostel is not available. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Sports are very good. It has a cricket ground, basketball ground, badminton court, and tennis court.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college because of the behaviour of staff members and other things.

content.Placements: From finance specialisation, banks hire us directly after a successful interview. Companies visit our college for campus placements. Our faculty members trained us for the interview and shortlisted us because the aim of every student in our college is to get placements.
content.Infrastructure: There are good housing facilities, and they secure things. Mathuradevi Group of Institutes is a big group which includes its small institutions such as MDIM, MDITM and MDIP. Some of the teachers here are good because they behave well with every student.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Mathuradevi is good college.

content.Placements: There are no placements on the campus as they are very less. A person has to find a job by their skills and talent. The college faculty members are supportive, and they help to find the job in a certain locality. They made the industrial training on the major and minor projects, and they assist the placement from other offices.
content.Infrastructure: The college is in the outskirts, so locality looks like farms everywhere. The buildings are enough good looking and have many classrooms. The laboratory is good. The computer labs need to be improved well. The library is well-maintained. Many improvements are going on in the college.

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied because of its faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 40 students were placed. The salary package offered was 4 LPA. The top recruiter was Infosys. About 60% of students got internships at Makers Tech Innovation Pvt. Ltd. Graduate engineer trainee and software engineer roles were offered. They offered upskilling training.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were good. The infrastructure was good. Labs and all other facilities were good. The canteen was good. Sports facilities were good. I would give 4 stars for all the facilities.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were knowledgeable and very supportive. Students who graduated from this college were industry-ready. It was very difficult to clear the exams. The pass percentage was 95%. Knowledgeable students were able to crack the exams at this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives a bright future for knowledgeable students.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA, the average salary package was 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Codilar and Infosys. Around 30% of students got internships at Verzeo. Top roles offered were programmer analyst, software associate, and system engineer. Students from all the branches got jobs in the IT industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library was very good. Labs were clean and they had all the needed equipment. Classrooms were good and had enough benches. The infrastructure of our college was in progress. Canteen served the best food, coffee, tea, and snacks. Cricket and sports were given importance in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Engineering life here is very good, and you can enjoy and outshine your future.

review_content.Placements: Very few students get placed here. Companies do not visit the college for placements. Some students get placed in various departments on their own. Some of the good companies in Mysore and Bangalore, like BYJU's, Infosys, and many others come here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good for learning, but the hostel facilities are not provided. The campus is enabled with good Wi-Fi at a good speed. Labs are well maintained, and the faculty are well-trained. There are good sports teams for football and cricket.

overview_faqs.question: Is Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology has a rating of 3.3 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.3, 3, 3.7 and 3 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I considered CSE branch for a better future.

content.Placements: About 50% of the total students enrolled in the year 2023 are in the Computer Science and Engineering branch, and the top recruiters are TCS, IBM, Infosys, etc. Here, students are encouraged to start their own businesses, even though there are various personality development courses that provide exposure to various emerging technologies and participation in coding contests.
content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, and the studies faculty members are excellent here. We get 100% support from professors, and the quality of education is okay. Canteen food is okay. Medical facilities are available for aid and other encouragement for blood donation. Other camps are organized at the campus. Wi-Fi is available during the college's running hours, and students get access easily and even at the library. Computers are available for students who cannot afford laptops.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really bad college. Not recommended.

content.Placements: There are very few members who are been placed in this college. They just take money in the name of internship they do nothing good in internship programme they are just forcing students to pay for the internship they are not allowed to travel in their own vehicle they force us to use their damn transportation facility which is not good .
content.Infrastructure: Not good at all it is just waste of time to join here the college is super small campus is not good no playground no sports no Wi-Fi for students labs are small not good need lots of improvements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied because of its faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: About 40 students were placed. The salary package offered was 4 LPA. The top recruiter was Infosys. About 60% of students got internships at Makers Tech Innovation Pvt. Ltd. Graduate engineer trainee and software engineer roles were offered. They offered upskilling training.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were good. The infrastructure was good. Labs and all other facilities were good. The canteen was good. Sports facilities were good. I would give 4 stars for all the facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers were knowledgeable and very supportive. Students who graduated from this college were industry-ready. It was very difficult to clear the exams. The pass percentage was 95%. Knowledgeable students were able to crack the exams at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives a bright future for knowledgeable students.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA, the average salary package was 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Codilar and Infosys. Around 30% of students got internships at Verzeo. Top roles offered were programmer analyst, software associate, and system engineer. Students from all the branches got jobs in the IT industry.
content.Infrastructure: Library was very good. Labs were clean and they had all the needed equipment. Classrooms were good and had enough benches. The infrastructure of our college was in progress. Canteen served the best food, coffee, tea, and snacks. Cricket and sports were given importance in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Engineering life here is very good, and you can enjoy and outshine your future.

content.Placements: Very few students get placed here. Companies do not visit the college for placements. Some students get placed in various departments on their own. Some of the good companies in Mysore and Bangalore, like BYJU's, Infosys, and many others come here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good for learning, but the hostel facilities are not provided. The campus is enabled with good Wi-Fi at a good speed. Labs are well maintained, and the faculty are well-trained. There are good sports teams for football and cricket.

description: Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 28158 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 28158 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 23571.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 171598 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 266233, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 96843 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.

admission_overview.college_name: SNMV College of Arts and Science Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: SNMV College of Arts and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SNMV College of Arts and Scienceadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers UG and PG level courses such as BCom, BBA, MSc, MBA, etc. To get admitted to SNMV, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers doctorate-level courses. The selection criteria for all the courses is based on merit or entrance exam as per respective courses. The application process atSNMV College of Arts and Scienceis conducted both online/offline. Read the article to know more aboutSNMV College of Arts and Sciencecourse admission2025.

SNMV College of Arts and Science admission 2025is merit-based for all courses excluding the MBA and PhD courses. The institute offers more than 10 courses (including specialisation) in various streams such as Science, Commerce, Management, etc. Check out the following table for details aboutSNMV College of Arts and Science course admissions2025:
Particulars
SNMV College of Arts and Science Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Affiliated to

The selection of the candidates will strictly be based on merit. The candidate should pass Class 12 with a 60% aggregate for all UG courses. Similarly, the selection of the candidates will strictly be based on merit for the PG programme. The candidates should have secured a minimum of 55% in graduation. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularSNMV College of Arts and Science courses:
Class 12 withCommerceand Accountancy
Class 12 with Commerce and Accountancy
BCom/ BCom with any specialisation
Graduate with a 55% aggregate
Post Graduate

SNMV College of Arts and Science admissionsare primarily merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at SNMV College of Arts and Science is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: SNMV College of Arts and Science Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online/offline. Aspirants need to apply at the official website (https://www.snmv.ac.in/courses-offered/) online course application. For offline applications, candidates must download the application form from the official website. Check the application fee from the points mentioned below:
STEP 1.1: SNMV College of Arts and Science PhD Application Process 2025

The University shall admit candidates through a two-stage process an entrance test, called Common Eligibility Test (CET), and an interview. CET shall normally be conductedby the University during June / July every year. The application process for Bharathiar University is completely online. Interested candidates must visit the application portal of Bharathiar University, i.e. https://www.b-u.ac.in/Home/Applications and click on the desired programme’s application portal.
STEP 2: Selection

The college considers entrance exam scores, i.e., CAT/MAT/TANCET/CMAT for the MBA courses. Students who are looking for PhD courses, students are selected based on Common Entrance Test conducted by Bharathiar University + Interview. For the UG courses, students are selected based on merit. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release ofSNMV College of Arts and Science cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSNMV College of Arts and Science feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

hostel_campus.college_name: SNMV College of Arts and Science Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placement opportunities in past years and some of the infrastructure is also go
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are not good. Mess and canteen food is average only. PG blocks are neat and clean. Libraries and labs are very good. Sports and games are very appreciated. Medical facilities are good in our college, so our college is not bad mostly.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its good campus.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful. The infrastructure of our college is good. We have a playground and a canteen. The department is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college should have a better infrastructure and a good canteen facility.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in our college. It can be used by students and staff. We have 5 computer labs and 3 science labs in our college. The infrastructure of the classrooms is good. We have two main libraries, in which we have a large variety of books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of studies and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our college. Canteen food is good in our college. Our college has a gym. The benches in our classroom are good. The college also offers food at a reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available for all the students at free of cost. Classrooms were comfortable, and I like the main block as it was built with black rocks which were warm in all the climates. Seatings were also good. All the instruments were available in labs, and teachers guided to how to use.

reviews.review_heading: It is good and valuable. There are university rank holders.
reviews.review_text: The college provided pure vegetarian food. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library were good. Sports facilities were too good. The college had 770 computer laboratories equipped with high-tech desktops, laptops, and computing systems. Wi-Fi-enhanced campus ensured seamless communication and provided abundant access to technology.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has every facility in the hostel, labs, and free Wi-Fi connection for students. Smart classes are provided, and for the Naan Mudhalvan course, our faculty also use PPT to cover the subject. Canteen food is negotiable and good in taste.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled but accessed by only a few students. We have a science lab. Around 5-6 computer labs in our college. Classrooms are well-maintained. Our college has 2 libraries. Libraries are available at any time.

reviews.review_heading: The college was built in very good atmosphere, so it is good for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college was totally covered by 50.3 acres. The college infrastructure was very brilliant. Wi-Fi was provided in the campus. The hostel mess provided pure vegetarian food.

college_info.college_name: Malwa College, Bathinda: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for Malwa College, Bathinda admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Malwa College, Bathinda offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. College offers B.Sc., BCA and B.Com courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The Malwa College, Bathinda course fee ranges between INR 16,000 to 1,90,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Malwa College, Bathinda is a well-known institution for PGDCA, M.Sc, MBA/PGDM, MCA, BCA, BBA, B.Com, B.A, B.Sc. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Malwa College, Bathinda has course specializations in Agriculture.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Malwa College, Bathinda?

reviews_list.review_title: Now I'm dissatisfied because placement services were not provided by them.

review_content.Placements: 0 percent of students were placed in my course because at that time placement system was not offered by the college. No recruiting companies were coming to our college. 0 percent of students got internships because internships were not offered by our college at my time.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facilities were not provided by our college. Library environment is very good in our college and all books are available for study. Canteen facilities are also good. Sports training is provided by expert teachers to all students. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Full satisfied with college infrastructure and other facilities.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 30% of students are placed annually in different private factories and companies. The highest package is 50,000; the average is 25,000; and the lowest is 10,000. Companies that recruit include Mhyco, Thakur, Ram Pesticides, US-81, Iffco, and Syngenta. Approximately 20% of students secured internships, primarily for sales manager positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers labs, Jio Wi-Fi facilities, well-set up bathrooms for boys and girls, a well-established canteen, a modernized nursery for research, smart classrooms, and a digital library with computer systems. The quality of facilities is excellent across all college departments.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college, studies and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60-70% of the students got placed. The average package is around Rs.1.5 Lacs. Infosys and Axis bank are the top recruiters. Almost 70% of the students got an internship. There are various roles offered in our course. Every year number of companies come and select better students from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi labs are available. There are number of libraries for different courses. Hostel facilities are good. Sports and games are also available for students. They get various rewards for games. In the hostel mess, there are no issues with the food. Every student gets a fresh meal there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the top colleges in Andhra Pradesh.

review_content.Placements: Top MNCs like Google, TCS, and Amazon offered the highest salary packages of 12 LPA for senior executive roles. About 60% of students got placed at these companies. Around 20% of students got internships at companies like Tata Group. Students in our batch got placed at top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities were good. All students could use Wi-Fi facilities in our college. Classrooms were good. All facilities were available in the labs. One of the best things about our college was the library. It had books that provided knowledge. The food was not like that in our home. Medical and sports facilities were good. There were national champions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are good. I'm satisfied with the faculty.

review_content.Placements: Nimra College of Business management is one of the good colleges in Vijayawada, Ibrahimpatnam, and Jupudi. I don't know about the placements of our seniors. However, the college invited some companies for our batch. Almost 45% of the students of our batch got placed in different companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides a lot of facilities. The campus was lush green. The infrastructure of the college is really good. The college also provides the library facility. The cricket ground and a volleyball court are also available here. There are many food courts, and the food served is okay. There is a stationary which is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College monents in the life.

review_content.Placements: Placement plays a key role in the engineering life. Due to issues like the recession and others, there are very few chances of getting a job in the industry. In college, some of the 20% of students may get a placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the hostel maintenance have been good compared to the others. It provides a bus facility to travel from the hostel to the college. The infrastructure in the college is also better to have a great piece of mind. So there is no chance for disturbance.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members in the college are so good and friendly. It is easy to clear any doubts present in the college. The curriculum is maintained by the state board, and the college follows the board structure. The exams are also maintained by the board.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college in the state with good faculty and facilities for students.

review_content.Placements: Specifically focusing on the percentage of students placed, salary packages, top recruiting companies, internship details, and top roles offered. Based on search results, a high percentage of students, around 75%, are placed at NRI Institute of Technology. The highest salary package offered is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average is likely around 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Hexaware, Virtusa, and Infosys. Approximately 75% of students also get internships, with companies like BlackBuck being mentioned as potential internship providers. 35% of students got placed in my college during my graduation time. The highest package was 13.5 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.6 LPA. Accenture was the top recruiting company, and Cognizant was also among the top. Almost 50% of students got internship opportunities.

Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.
M.E./M.Tech

Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
MBA/PGDM

Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

answer.text: Courses offered by Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur offers specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Structural Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.

overview_faqs.question: Can Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur has a rating of 3.9 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4, 3.7, 4.2 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A college between average and good.

content.Placements: 67% percent of students are placed in my course. 11, 7 and 3 LPA are the highest, the lowest and the average package offered in my course. Microsoft, TCS and Salesforce are the top recruiting companies for my course. I don't know about it correctly about percent of students who got an internship from the course. AIML and DS top roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department include good Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of our NRI Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: In our college, the placements are average. The highest package for the last year was for the diploma students was 7 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 3 LPA. The internships for the Diploma students are available in our college, and for all the students who did not clear the backlogs, all students have been provided internships, and also placements are provided for the diploma students in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in our college are very good. In our college, the Wi-Fi is provided to the entire campus. We have a canteen in our college, and all items and food are available in our canteen. We have a library with a lot of books, and they are very helpful for the students in our college. In our college, the hostel facilities are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College monents in the life.

content.Placements: Placement plays a key role in the engineering life. Due to issues like the recession and others, there are very few chances of getting a job in the industry. In college, some of the 20% of students may get a placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the hostel maintenance have been good compared to the others. It provides a bus facility to travel from the hostel to the college. The infrastructure in the college is also better to have a great piece of mind. So there is no chance for disturbance.
content.Faculty: The faculty members in the college are so good and friendly. It is easy to clear any doubts present in the college. The curriculum is maintained by the state board, and the college follows the board structure. The exams are also maintained by the board.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Very good college in the state with good faculty and facilities for students.

content.Placements: Specifically focusing on the percentage of students placed, salary packages, top recruiting companies, internship details, and top roles offered. Based on search results, a high percentage of students, around 75%, are placed at NRI Institute of Technology. The highest salary package offered is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average is likely around 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Hexaware, Virtusa, and Infosys. Approximately 75% of students also get internships, with companies like BlackBuck being mentioned as potential internship providers. 35% of students got placed in my college during my graduation time. The highest package was 13.5 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.6 LPA. Accenture was the top recruiting company, and Cognizant was also among the top. Almost 50% of students got internship opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Nri Institute of Technology - The power house of technology.

content.Placements: In my college, few members are placed last time, 30 members are placed among 100 students. Some companies like Magic Bus and Cognizant. We have a well-trained faculty to give CS training to get placements, especially in 3-2 and 4-1 seems they give more training by conducting more number of classes.
content.Infrastructure: The college environment is very good. The infrastructure is very nice. The labs are advanced with new servers. We have a digital library. Now our college management is constructing a new advanced block with good facilities. We have a hygiene canteen and their food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our NRI Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are very good. In our college, the Wi-Fi is provided to the entire campus. We have a canteen in our college, and all items and food are available in our canteen. We have a library with a lot of books, and they are very helpful for the students in our college. In our college, the hostel facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: College monents in the life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the hostel maintenance have been good compared to the others. It provides a bus facility to travel from the hostel to the college. The infrastructure in the college is also better to have a great piece of mind. So there is no chance for disturbance.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college in the state with good faculty and facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: My college is eco-friendly. Different departments have separate blocks. Labs are present in every block. The food quality is very good in my college. The hostel quality is above average. There is no Wi-Fi in my college, and only the Airtel network works in the campus surroundings.

reviews.review_heading: Nri Institute of Technology - The power house of technology.
reviews.review_text: The college environment is very good. The infrastructure is very nice. The labs are advanced with new servers. We have a digital library. Now our college management is constructing a new advanced block with good facilities. We have a hygiene canteen and their food is average.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent infrastructure, industry-relevant curriculum, and strong placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: My college offers high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, including classrooms, labs, and common areas. Computer labs are equipped with high-performance computers with modern processors and need necessary software like Python, R, MYSQL, Jupiter Notebooks, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a limited number of placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Classrooms are very spacious. Library is also good. The quality of food is also very satisfying. No medical facilities are provided in our college. Sports are not conducted in college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel is very good, and infrastructure is like a double-bedroom flat. Food and transport facilities are very good. The food has a slightly different taste, and there are no libraries in the hostel. But, there are labs and a library in our college, a peaceful library, and very nice labs.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college faculty, TNP department(Training and Placement), Good canteen.
reviews.review_text: There are many computer labs in our college. As an ECE student, we have a VLSI lab, EDC lab, MPMC lab, and IoT labs with a large number of classrooms and a large library. We have peaceful weather in the library. The facilities are very good in our college. The hostel is very good in our college with spacious rooms and quality food they are providing in our hostel. There are medical facilities available at mid-time also and regarding games, only on Sundays they will permit us to play games.

reviews.review_heading: About my college life and the facilities and the infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. Very good & clean maintenance of classrooms, washrooms, libraries, labs, and academics is there. There is a small field, but no guidance is given for any of the sports. The food is good and healthy. There is a need to increase the number of qualified professors to make a good understanding of each and every concept.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely Satisfying because of Best faculty members, Good Placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are excellent. Wi-Fi connection is also good. In the library, 2500+ volumes are there. Our college canteen food is also excellent. Canteen food is also provided to college hostel students. The quality of the food is excellent. But sometimes, rarely, food quality changes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nri Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. Labs are average. The library is available for students and it is in good condition. The hostel facility is available in our college. The food served in the hostel is good. The atmosphere of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nri Institute Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but not up to the mark. Some labs are working but does not have sufficient equipment. Library is good in our college which is pleasant and very peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities and infrastructure are good. Laboratory is well-maintained. Our classrooms we good, and it also provides a library. The food served in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with staff and fellow students but disappointed with placements and college ground.
reviews.review_text: NRIIT college contains 3 blocks for different years and a library. Wi-Fi is not available in our college for students. There are 3 computer labs for CSE students, a workshop for mechanical students and a core lab for civil students. Classrooms are neat and clean with suitable lighting and air. The hostel for girls is not recommended because of its infrastructure and cleanliness. The food served is average in both hostel and canteen. The playground is not in a proper way to play games. highlights.summary: The TANCET 2026 application form will be live from Mar 16, 2026, to Apr 10, 2026, for Valluvar College of Science and Management admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 585 students were admitted at Valluvar College of Science and Management and 514 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 514 students 304 were placed with median salary of INR 192000 and 80 students opted for higher studies. A total of 497 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at Valluvar College of Science and Managementand 439 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 439 students 269 were placed with median salary of INR 205000 and 61 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 76 students were admitted at Valluvar College of Science and Management and 76 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 76 students 51 were placed with median salary of INR 215000. A total of 58 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Valluvar College of Science and Managementand 49 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 49 students 39 were placed with median salary of INR 215000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Valluvar College of Science and Management offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Hospitality & Travel. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely MBA/PGDM, BCA and BBA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Valluvar College of Science and Management offers MBA/PGDM. The fees for Valluvar College of Science and Management courses is INR 1,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, a good college for students providing 100% help for placements in our college.

review_content.Placements: This course provides placement; the highest average package salary is 35,000; the top companies are TCS, WIPRO, etc.; the top roles are member, manager, and auditor; most of the placement offerings are from colleges; and 80% of students got internships from Valluvar College.
review_content.Infrastructure: Most of the facilities available in our college, such as labs, a digital library, classrooms, an auditorium, a canteen, Wi-Fi available, a lift available, and 4 labs, are available. Sports include the best cricket, volleyball, kabaddi, badminton, and other sports with ground facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is an well-authorised college to develop our careers the best in the future.

review_content.Placements: About 70-80% of students got placed on various companies. Management can bring most of the companies for campus interviews. It will also inform about the off-campus drives. It provides many vacancies in many companies. Banks also visit the college to hire some students.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a single four-sided building. There is no separate block or building for individuals or a couple of departments. All departments come under one roof. There is no Wi-Fi for students. There is a private canteen, which provides excellent taste food and good services. Many lab facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The whole college experience so far has been great.

review_content.Placements: We have had placements for our summer internships and around 98% of the students were placed in companies like Aditya Birla, Citi bank, Mondelez international and so on. The opportunities to apply in various companies were given. The placement teams works hard to get everyone placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a huge library, computer lab, recreational centers and canteen facilities providing good service and the staff is helpful too. For the MBA course we were provided with laptops and Wi-Fi services in college. We have the Music room called the MET world of Music where we can sit back and relax ourselves while listening to music.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: For summer internships, marketing roles are offered more as compared to finance. Finance people have very less options coming on campus as most of the companies expect them to do sales. That's all what I can say on placements. This college is known for marketing placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library, canteen and all is too good. Even music room which no other college provides, helps in refreshing minds and you can learn art of music with study and it refreshes your mind.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and curriculum is kept as per industrial knowledge required. PGDM course curriculum is most relevant according to me. Faculty is also concerned about students so they keep on making changes in curriculum where ever and whenever required.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered in 2024 till now is 20 LPA. Here at MET, we get equal opportunities in each specialisation. Mostly 90-95% of students are placed each year. Various big companies like HDFC, ICICI, Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan, and many more offer good packages and internship benefits.
content.Infrastructure: In PGDM course, they provide laptops and have college Wi-Fi connectivity. The library is huge and it has necessary study material and variety of books other than studies also. Daily newspapers are kept so anyone can enhance. They have a music room and also a playroom.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great option to opt for MBA and PGDM

content.Placements: Companies like Reliance Jio, Morgan Stanley, Deloitte, and Godrej give great opportunities in terms of placement. Also, all specializations like Marketing, Finance, Hr , and Operations have great opportunities, and grooming is done here very well, so you are prepared for the interviews .
content.Infrastructure: It provides laptops which have college Wi-Fi connected. Amazing library variety of books are available and affordable, and you can taste food in the canteen. Medical facilities are also available, and there are clean washrooms. Many events are organised where sports events are organised.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The whole college experience so far has been great.

content.Placements: We have had placements for our summer internships and around 98% of the students were placed in companies like Aditya Birla, Citi bank, Mondelez international and so on. The opportunities to apply in various companies were given. The placement teams works hard to get everyone placed.
content.Infrastructure: We have a huge library, computer lab, recreational centers and canteen facilities providing good service and the staff is helpful too. For the MBA course we were provided with laptops and Wi-Fi services in college. We have the Music room called the MET world of Music where we can sit back and relax ourselves while listening to music.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: For summer internships, marketing roles are offered more as compared to finance. Finance people have very less options coming on campus as most of the companies expect them to do sales. That's all what I can say on placements. This college is known for marketing placements.
content.Infrastructure: Library, canteen and all is too good. Even music room which no other college provides, helps in refreshing minds and you can learn art of music with study and it refreshes your mind.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and curriculum is kept as per industrial knowledge required. PGDM course curriculum is most relevant according to me. Faculty is also concerned about students so they keep on making changes in curriculum where ever and whenever required.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has great infrastructure and good placements.

content.Placements: Good companies came to the college this year. Most of the students got internships. The placement committee of our college is very helpful as they help us to keep track of our interviews. Almost every student has got placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is great. The classrooms are well-equipped and air-conditioned. We also have a huge library, convention center for seminars, recreation area, MET World of Music, playgrounds, conference rooms etc. The canteen food is also great.
